name: Auguste Rodin

acts.description: Used and discarded sculptor Camille Claudel, refusing to marry her while using her artistic ideas, leading to her eventual collapse and institutionalization

behavior_summary: Had a fifteen-year relationship with the brilliant sculptor Camille Claudel, used her artistically and personally, then returned to his longstanding partner. Claudel ended her life in an institution.

art.summary: The father of modern sculpture. His work is the bridge between classical and modern figurative sculpture and influenced virtually every sculptor who followed.

verdict.blurb: He is celebrated as a genius. Camille Claudel spent thirty years in a psychiatric institution after he left her. Some scholars believe her best work was credited to him. The Thinker doesn't think about her. Someone should.
